MODULE: cosmos.network.cosmos_auth
FILE: cosmos/network/cosmos_auth.py (231 lines)
CATEGORY: network

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS Proof-of-Swarm Authentication
=====================================

5-layer auth stack:
  1. Swarm Seed — shared 256-bit secret, identity = BLAKE3(seed || name)
  2. GPU Fingerprint — hardware-bound via deterministic CUDA compute
  3. Temporal Hash Mesh — interleaved hash chains across nodes

CLASSES:
- RollingSeal: Per-connection rolling seal for packet authentication.

Each packet gets a uniqu
  Methods: def sequence(self) -> int
  Methods: def seal(self, payload: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, int]
  Methods: def verify(self, payload: bytes, seal_value: bytes, sequence: int) -> bool

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def generate_swarm_seed() -> bytes
- def load_swarm_seed() -> Optional[bytes]
- def get_or_create_seed() -> bytes
- def derive_identity(swarm_seed: bytes, bot_name: str) -> bytes
- def derive_node_identity(swarm_seed: bytes, node_name: str, gpu_fingerprint: bytes) -> bytes
- def compute_gpu_fingerprint() -> bytes
- def generate_challenge() -> bytes
- def solve_challenge(identity_token: bytes, challenge: bytes, timestamp: float) -> bytes
- def verify_challenge(identity_token: bytes, challenge: bytes, response: bytes, timestamp: float, max_age_seconds: float=

INTERNAL DEPS: cosmos_config
